first: Ohh, welcome traveler!
Isn't that statue beautifull!
What, you don't remember anything??
Well, that's probably for the best.
The goblins have attacked us!
You need to rescue the captured humans!
I mean, you do look like a strong warrior!
So what are you waiting for and go north to find them!

args: Defeat the goblins, who are guarding the captured humans!

first: The skeleton wanted to take me to the other prisoners!
If you want to save them you will need some good weapons
Here a little gift for saving me!
Thanks, man!
Thank you for saving me!
Here use this! It is the least I can give you!

args.text: Explore other parts of the village first!

first: Why does everybody leave their garbage on the street?!
Please, help us!
We need to stop the goblins!
Here use this to defend yourself!
Now defeat the goblins!
questCompleted: Finally the goblins have been stopped!
From attacking our village at least!

args: Defend the village from the goblins

first: Are you Elric?
The king wants you to speak with him!

args: Find and talk with the king!

first: You need a way to go to the goblin kingdom?
Hahaha... good joke!
You're not joking?
Uhmm my horse is way to precious for this type of job!
second: But only for one gold ingot, haha!
Someone of your prestige can definetly pay up, right?

first: Woof woof!
A way to the goblin kingdom, ey?
Mate, I wouldn't wanna ask why one would set out on such cruel journey
Well, I can't help you, sorry
second: Wait, there's a farmer, who is selling his steed!

first: I overheard some knights!
They were talking about an invasion!
An invasion from the goblins attacking our very village!
They even wanted to desert!
Hey!
Are you the guy who stopped the goblins?
Hahahaha...
I bet on a gold ingot you can't even defeat a single goblin!
Well, then show me by going to the goblin hideout!

args: Raid the goblin village in the far north!

first: You want something to drink?
Aaahh...
Ohh, hello!
You want to taste some of the best wine?
I got you!
Its right here!
The blacksmith has really out done himself!
Want to hear a joke?
second: Every plant survived - out of fear.

first: I have been expecting you, old friend!
Ohh I forgot. You don't remember me, don't you?
Long ago, you made an oath to protect the kingdom!
But the goblins captured you and erased your memory!
Sadly enough the goblins have become too powerfull
So the only way to defeat them is ...                                   to destroy them from the inside!
Good luck, my friend!
I have never seen such a tall goblin!
The king wants me to give this to you!
second: The goblins can't see you with this mask!

first: Look I brought us a snack!
Want to taste test?
Don't you dare steal the keys!
I remember every goblin, I see!
Wait, you're not a goblin?!
Please, help me!
The goblins will attack you however once you've freed me!
second: I can escape on my own!
Just try to find the king!
